svg.title: MEMRY system architecture and data flow
svg.desc: Three-layer diagram showing contributor, server, and device layers with numbered data flow steps

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a contributor upload a photo to MEMRY?')
sendPrompt('What can Jo see and do in the MEMRY web app?')
sendPrompt('What can the device owner do that contributors cannot?')
sendPrompt('What does the Next.js web app do in MEMRY?')
sendPrompt('How does the MEMRY image processing pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('What does Supabase store for MEMRY?')
sendPrompt('How does ESP32 deep sleep work and how much power does it use?')
sendPrompt('How does the MEMRY device connect to WiFi on wake?')
sendPrompt('What HTTP request does the MEMRY device make to the server?')
sendPrompt('How does ETag caching work in the MEMRY firmware?')
sendPrompt('How does the BMP get rendered onto the e-ink display?')
sendPrompt('Why is display.hibernate() critical after every e-ink refresh?')
